headline: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods Maintains Outperform on Assurant, Raises Price Target to $310
summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods  analyst Tommy McJoynt   maintains Assurant (NYSE:AIZ) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $270 to $310.
